rulePacks:
version: '1.0'
id: acme-rules
name: ACME Org Rules
rules:
  - id: ACME-001
    severity: high
    title: Internal MCP Server Detected
    explanation: The ACME internal MCP server is present. Ensure it is approved.
    recommendation: Verify this server is on the approved list.
    match:
      fact: mcp_server
      args_contain: '@acme/internal-mcp-server'
